impossible-coconut-pie.name: Impossible Coconut Pie
instructions: Combine milk, sugar, baking mix, butter, eggs, and vanilla in blender; blend on low speed for 3 minutes.
Pour into the prepared pie plate and let stand for 5 minutes. Sprinkle coconut over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Let pie cool briefly before slicing; serve warm.

instant-pot-green-moong-dal.name: Instant Pot Green Moong Dal
instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot) and select Sauté function. Heat olive oil; add onion, garlic, ginger, and cumin. Cook until tender, about 2 minutes.

Combine water, moong dal lentils, coriander, salt, garam masala, cayenne pepper, and turmeric in the pot. Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 15 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, 10 to 40 minutes. Unlock and remove lid. Stir in lemon juice and cilantro.

instant-pot-ribs-from-frozen.name: Instant Pot Ribs From Frozen

ingredients.prep: membrane removed and cut into 4 slabs

instructions: Pour water into a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot). Set the trivet inside.
Sprinkle hickory smoke seasoning liberally over frozen ribs; set ribs on top of the trivet. Close and lock the lid.
Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set the timer for 45 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 15 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.
Preheat the oven broiler. Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source.
Transfer ribs to a rimmed baking sheet. Brush with barbecue sauce. Broil until glazed, 4 to 5 minutes.

instant-pot-steamed-crab-legs.name: Instant Pot Steamed Crab Legs
instructions: Place a trivet in a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot) and add water. Place crab legs on top of the trivet; you may need to let them thaw for a few minutes so they will fit.
Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set the timer for 3 minutes. Allow 10 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure carefully using the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.
Use tongs to transfer crab legs to a serving dish.
Squeeze lemon juice on top and serve with melted butter.

instant-pot-curried-chicken-thighs.name: Instant Pot® Curried Chicken Thighs

ingredients.prep: cut in half and thinly sliced

instructions: Season chicken thighs with 2 teaspoons curry powder, honey powder, salt, and black pepper.

Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot®) and select Saute function. Heat oil and butter. Add chicken and cook until browned, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate. Add onion; cook and stir until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and ginger; cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Return chicken to Instant Pot®. Add tomatoes and tomato powder. Close and lock the lid.
Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 20 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, for 10 minutes. Switch to the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions and release remaining pressure for about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.
Turn on Saute function. Add coconut milk, cumin, and remaining curry powder to the pot. Cook until sauce has thickened, about 5 minutes.

instant-pot-port-cranberry-sauce.name: Instant Pot® Port Cranberry Sauce
instructions: Combine cranberries, sugar, port, and salt in a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot®). Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 5 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, 10 to 40 minutes. Unlock and remove lid. Add cinnamon stick and select Saute function; cook until sauce thickens, 5 to 10 minutes. Remove and discard cinnamon stick.
Blend sauce with an immersion blender for a smoother consistency. Let cool; sauce will continue to thicken naturally.

island-cheese-pies-argiro.name: Island Cheese Pies

ingredients.item: A few drops of lemon juice (the vintage)
A few drops of lemon juice (the vintage)

instructions: We knead all the actors for the leaf together.
Once the dough is formed, wrap it in a membrane and allow it to rest in the refrigerator.
Add the sour nose into a bowl.
Beat the eggs with the wire and add them to the bowl with the sour pepper, add the mint, nutmeg and lots of pepper.
Mix the filling mixture well.
Then spread the dough into a leaf and cut into around pieces about 10 cm in diameter.
Add to each piece 1 tablespoon filling.
Wet the edges of the dough with some water using a brush, fold it in the shape of a half moon and close it hard by pressing the edges with a fork.
After making all the cheese pies, Fry themm in a non-stick pan with hot olive oil and serve them warm.
Alternatively, we can make them in a well preheated evening at 180.4. 3

italian-long-hots-with-tahini-yogurt.name: Italian Long Hots With Tahini Yogurt

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: pricked all over with a paring knife

instructions: Stir together 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, ¼ cup plain whole-milk yogurt, ¼ cup tahini, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl until smooth. Set tahini yogurt aside.

Heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Working in 2 batches and adding more oil between batches if needed, add 12 oz. Italian long hot peppers, pricked all over with a paring knife, and cook, tossing occasionally, until slightly softened and blistered, about 5 minutes per batch. Transfer to a plate.

Return peppers to pot and add 2 Tbsp. sugar, ½ cup white wine vinegar, and remaining 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, tossing peppers constantly, until glazed, about 3 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. water and toss, scraping up browned bits stuck to bottom of pot, until peppers are glossy. Remove from heat and drizzle in remaining 1 Tbsp. white wine vinegar; toss to coat. Taste and season with more kosher salt if needed.
Spread reserved tahini yogurt over a platter. Arrange peppers on top and pour any juices in pot over. Season with flaky sea salt and freshly ground pepper.
